_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin/NF2 loss-driven tumorigenesis linked to CRL4(DCAF1)-mediated inhibition of the hippo pathway kinases Lats1 and 2 in the nucleus.

_contextSnippet: YAP-5SA enabled the DCAF1-silenced FC-1801 cells to grow in soft agar and to form tumors upon subcutaneous injection in nude mice
details: YAP-5SA enabled DCAF1-silenced cells to form tumors upon subcutaneous injection in nude mice
